object_type: linear cosmological perturbation system for DFM-MKC metric, rigidity amplitude, structural phase, visible matter, and photons
purpose: Supply the linearized DFM-MKC perturbation system required after the field-equation and matter-coupling objects, while leaving numerical prediction vectors and data comparison as downstream objects.

background_solution.background_equations_status: Background equations are inherited from DFM_MKC_FIELD_EQUATIONS_V1 after imposing FLRW symmetry; explicit numerical background solving is deferred to the prediction-vector object.

gauge_choice.name: Newtonian gauge
gauge_choice.metric_perturbation: ds^2 = a(eta)^2[-(1+2 Psi)deta^2 + (1-2 Phi)delta_ij dx^i dx^j]
gauge_choice.vector_tensor_modes: Not included in V1; scalar sector only.
gauge_choice.residual_gauge_status: Fixed at scalar linear order by Newtonian gauge assumptions.

linearized_equations.poisson_constraint: k^2 Phi + 3 Hc(Phi_prime + Hc Psi) = -4 pi G a^2 delta_rho_total
linearized_equations.momentum_constraint: k^2(Phi_prime + Hc Psi) = 4 pi G a^2 sum_A[(rho_A + p_A) theta_A]
linearized_equations.anisotropy_relation: k^2(Phi - Psi) = 12 pi G a^2 (rho_total + p_total) sigma_total
linearized_equations.dfm_delta_phi_equation: alpha[delta_phi_double_prime + 2 Hc delta_phi_prime + (k^2 + a^2 U_double_prime(phi_bar))delta_phi - phi_bar_prime(Psi_prime + 3 Phi_prime) + 2 a^2 Psi U_prime(phi_bar)] - beta[delta_phi theta_bar_prime^2 + 2 phi_bar theta_bar_prime delta_theta_prime - 2 phi_bar theta_bar_prime^2 Psi] = 0
linearized_equations.dfm_delta_theta_equation: (beta phi_bar^2 delta_theta_prime)_prime + 2 beta phi_bar phi_bar_prime delta_theta_prime + beta phi_bar^2 k^2 delta_theta + metric_source_theta + amplitude_source_theta = 0
linearized_equations.visible_baryon_euler: v_b_prime + Hc v_b = k Psi + photon_baryon_drag_terms
linearized_equations.closure_status: Boltzmann hierarchy closure, recombination physics, and numerical source functions are deferred to the prediction-vector object.

source_terms.sigma_total: sigma_total is the total scalar anisotropic stress.
source_terms.stress_tensor_source: Computed by linearizing T_DFM_MKC_{mu nu} from DFM_MKC_FIELD_EQUATIONS_V1.
source_terms.delta_rho_DFM_MKC_status: Computed by linearizing T_DFM_MKC_{00} from DFM_MKC_FIELD_EQUATIONS_V1.
source_terms.delta_p_DFM_MKC_status: Computed by linearizing spatial trace of T_DFM_MKC_{ij}.

initial_conditions.adiabatic_mode_template: All species begin with common primordial curvature perturbation R_star, with DFM-MKC perturbations initialized consistently with the linearized constraint equations.
initial_conditions.isocurvature_mode_template: Optional DFM-MKC isocurvature perturbations may be tracked but are not promoted as fit parameters in V1.
initial_conditions.normalization_status: Primordial amplitude and spectral tilt are not fit here; prediction-vector object must bind them.

transfer_functions.observable_transfer_status: CMB, lensing, BAO, and matter-power transfer-to-observable maps are downstream prediction-vector objects.

growth_equation.matter_density_contrast: delta_m = weighted visible-matter density contrast after specifying species weights.
growth_equation.generic_growth_form: delta_m_double_prime + A(k, eta) delta_m_prime + B(k, eta) delta_m = S_DFM_MKC(k, eta)
growth_equation.source_meaning: S_DFM_MKC is induced by the DFM-MKC metric and stress-energy perturbations.
growth_equation.growth_observable_status: No numerical f sigma_8 or P(k) prediction is supplied in V1.

stability_conditions.gradient_stability_template: Principal scalar-sector gradient terms have positive sign under alpha > 0 and beta > 0.
stability_conditions.tachyonic_status: Potential-dependent instabilities depend on U_double_prime(phi_bar) and are not globally ruled out here.
stability_conditions.ghost_status: No ghost claim beyond the displayed positive kinetic-sign template.

does_not_prove: DFM-MKC ACT Planck DESI prediction vector
next_admissible_step: Supply DFM_MKC_ACT_PLANCK_DESI_PREDICTION_VECTOR_V1 from the linear perturbation system.
